feat.name: Spell Swallow
feat.text:
Your ostilli has grown strong enough to completely consume a spell cast at you, granting you the Devour Ambient Magic action.  
  
 **Devour Ambient Magic** (concentrate)

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: A creature Casts a Spell with you as the only target
feat.effect: Your ostilli radiates cyan light as its tentacle-like filters attempt to consume the magical effect. You can attempt to counteract the triggering spell with an Arcana or Nature check and a counteract rank equal to half your level.
